features: SUPER SOFT: Cotton Tree cotton wool pleat is soft, gentle and absorbent. Simply pull to remove the amount you need for cleansing or moisturising
COSMETIC ESSENTIAL: Apply cleansing lotions, skin and eye make up cleansers, oils and powders. Remove make-up and nail polishes.
NATURAL COTTON: Hypoallergenic, made from 100 Percentpure natural cotton, perfect for daily use

GENTLE CLEANSING: Always use a cleanser made to remove makeup, apply as directed. Take care around the eye, the skin is thinner, do not pull or rub. Apply and leave as cleanser directsto help dissolve makeup,making it easier and gentler on the skin to remove. Rubbing at the skin can irritate.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Convenient pleat of soft cotton wool
